articles.summary: A notetaker bot goes beyond transcription to generate summaries, action items, formatted notes – and (if implemented wisely) big revenue for your application. But try to create one yourself and you'll quickly find that building a bot to take the minutes can take… well, months.

articles.title: WHAT AI CAN'T—AND SHOULDN'T—DO FOR PRODUCT MANAGERS
articles.summary: AI is transforming product management by streamlining tedious tasks, but overreliance risks eroding the empathy, trust, and deep understanding needed to build great products. To use AI effectively, teams must automate selectively while maintaining direct user engagement, manual insight synthesis, and authentic stakeholder relationships.

articles.title: THE AI QUALITY COUP
articles.summary: AI is reshaping the definition of quality work, making style replication easy but true artistry rare. Navigating this new era demands deeper creativity, richer narratives, and constant exploration beyond the obvious.

articles.title: WHY YOUR PRODUCT DISCOVERY FEELS TOO THEORETICAL
articles.summary: Product discovery should be treated like a product - focused on reducing uncertainty, not rigid frameworks - with its intensity matching the team's level of uncertainty. Success is measured by evidence-based decisions that validate real problems, discard bad ideas early, and prioritize impactful work.

articles.title: 7 BOLD MOVES TO DEFEAT THE BLOODY FEATURE FACTORY BEFORE IT BURNS YOU OUT
articles.summary: The true threat to product management isn't AI, but the feature factory mindset of mindless shipping. Defeating it requires radical focus, customer connection, and treating product development as a strategic investment.

articles.title: CONCIERGE: TALK TO YOUR APPS WITH NATURAL LANGUAGE
articles.summary: Concierge is the first connected AI Assistant designed for Product Managers. It can read & write to your apps in real-time; simply connect in 2 clicks (Gmail, Slack, Notion, Linear, Jira, Confluence, Airtable, Asana, HubSpot, Attio, Salesforce, etc) and ask Concierge

articles.title: anything. Sign up today and try it for free.
MASTERING AI EVALS: A COMPLETE GUIDE FOR PMS
articles.summary: Building strong AI evaluation systems enables rapid iteration, debugging, and fine-tuning by focusing on real-world performance, custom metrics, and continuous data review, not just picking models or frameworks.

articles.title: MOST PEOPLE ARE BUILDING AI PRODUCTS WRONG - HERE'S HOW TO DO IT RIGHT
articles.summary: In the era of "compound AI," most companies bolt AI onto products, creating flashy but shallow features, while companies like Attio succeed by deeply integrating AI to make workflows seamless and intuitive. By democratizing experimentation, focusing on user problems, building invisible infrastructure, and prioritizing human-centered evaluation, teams can create AI-driven products that solve real problems without forcing new user habits.

articles.title: BRING IT BACK TO THE PROBLEM
articles.summary: The advice to "prioritize based on value" is misleading, as "value" is meaningless without a clear strategy, making formulas like RICE ineffective. Instead, product leaders should align around OKRs or prioritize critical problems to maintain momentum even without a full strategy.

articles.title: AMBIENT AI: WHAT YOU NEED TO KNOW AS A PRODUCT MANAGER
articles.summary: Ambient AI, which operates silently in the background, enhances user experiences by reducing friction, anticipating needs, and enabling more intuitive, personalized products. As generative AI excitement fades, ambient AI offers lasting, transformative value.

articles.title: PULLING THE FUTURE INTO THE PRESENT
articles.summary: Tech advances rapidly, but adoption lags behind, shaped by trust and habits - bridging that gap faster creates a lasting competitive edge.

articles.title: INCORPORATING AI INTO YOUR UX WORKFLOW
articles.summary: AI adoption in design is accelerating rapidly, shifting expectations from novelty to necessity. Designers who embrace AI for efficiency, creativity, and ethical practice will lead the next wave of innovation.
